definitions.title: Prepare the next market session
definitions.outcomeDescription: Produce an evidence-linked preparation checklist for the next session.
limitations: Research preparation only; no execution or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Triage market actions
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded action or no-action research branch with evidence.
limitations: Research triage only; no execution or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Investigate latent risk
definitions.outcomeDescription: Combine a risk checklist with a bounded decision branch over current evidence.
limitations: Risk research only; no alarm, execution, or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Stress the local portfolio research scope
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded scenarios against an opaque local portfolio revision reference.
limitations: Stores only an opaque local revision reference; no holdings, execution, or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Decide whether leadership is broad or narrow
definitions.outcomeDescription: Complete an evidence checklist for market breadth and concentration.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Investigate a sector outlier
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded branch explaining whether an outlier is broad, narrow, or unresolved.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Triage unusual option contracts
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through current EOD unusualness evidence without inferring trade side.
limitations: EOD positioning research only; no trade-side or execution claim.

definitions.title: Separate catalyst evidence from noise
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach an evidence-bound catalyst, noise, or unresolved branch.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Classify the current session
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through current auction evidence and record a bounded session class.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or order-flow claim.

definitions.title: Define a level trigger and invalidation
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded support-resistance scenarios and record a falsifiable plan.
limitations: Research workflow only; no order creation or execution.

definitions.title: Classify trend, range, or reversal
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded swing-regime branch from current owner evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Test a support thesis
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded support-hold and support-failure scenarios.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or portfolio mutation.

definitions.title: Map option-implied support and resistance
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through current walls, flip, expected move, and skew evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or dealer-position certainty.

definitions.title: Stress option walls and gamma flip
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded spot, volatility, and time scenarios against current option evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no execution or dealer-position certainty.

definitions.title: Evaluate a gamma-flip setup
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded pin, trend, overextension, or unresolved branch.
limitations: Research workflow only; no order creation or execution.

definitions.title: Prepare an OPEX research plan
definitions.outcomeDescription: Complete an evidence checklist for expiration-cycle conditions and invalidation.
limitations: Research workflow only; no order creation or execution.

definitions.title: Identify a sector transition
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded rotate-in, rotate-out, wait, or unresolved branch.
limitations: Research workflow only; no allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Select an ETF research vehicle
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through fit, liquidity, cost, concentration, and tracking evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Compare country research candidates
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through momentum, FX, close-time, risk, and diversification evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Stress FX and risk penalties
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded FX, volatility, freshness, and diversification scenarios.
limitations: Research workflow only; no allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Build a real-asset driver thesis
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through source-qualified dollar, rate, risk, volatility, drawdown, and breadth evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Stress a real-asset driver reversal
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded driver-support and driver-reversal scenarios.
limitations: Research workflow only; no allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Classify the fixed-income regime
definitions.outcomeDescription: Complete a current-evidence checklist for rates, spreads, curve, real yields, and inflation.
limitations: Research workflow only; no sleeve allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Compare fixed-income sleeves
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded rate, spread, carry, convexity, and inflation scenarios.
limitations: Research workflow only; no sleeve allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Identify AI-capex beneficiaries
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through theme, horizon, crowding, risk, and source evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no portfolio allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Build and stress an AI-capex barbell
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded beneficiary, damper, crowding, and correlation scenarios.
limitations: Research workflow only; no portfolio allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Build the earnings scenario tree
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through reported anchors and explicit margin and EPS assumptions.
limitations: Scenario research only; no earnings certainty or execution.

definitions.title: Identify the valuation driver
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded margin, EPS, anchor, and multiple scenarios.
limitations: Scenario research only; no earnings certainty or execution.

definitions.title: Audit company evidence sufficiency
definitions.outcomeDescription: Complete a source, period, lineage, gap, and accepted-state evidence checklist.
limitations: Research workflow preserves evidence gaps and cannot manufacture missing facts.

definitions.title: Revise the linked company scenario
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through source-qualified assumptions while preserving accepted-state lineage.
limitations: Research workflow preserves evidence gaps and cannot manufacture missing facts.

definitions.title: Select an ETF for a research objective
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through momentum, risk, benchmark, basket, and constraint evidence.
limitations: Research workflow only; no basket allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Test ETF ranking robustness
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded horizon, blend, risk, benchmark, and constraint scenarios.
limitations: Research workflow only; no basket allocation or execution.

definitions.title: Improve one strategy variable
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through a seeded one-variable search and out-of-sample acceptance decision.
limitations: Research workflow only; no strategy deployment or execution.

definitions.title: Explain an out-of-sample failure
definitions.outcomeDescription: Complete an evidence checklist for fold, penalty, instability, and rejected-change causes.
limitations: Research workflow only; no strategy deployment or execution.

definitions.title: Decide whether an edge survives
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded survives, rejected, partial, or unresolved validation branch.
limitations: Research workflow only; no strategy deployment or execution.

definitions.title: Compare strategy variants
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded rule, fold, cost, trial, and robustness scenarios.
limitations: Research workflow only; no strategy deployment or execution.

definitions.title: Evaluate a disclosure cluster
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through source mix, lag, cluster, consensus, and decay evidence.
limitations: Disclosure research only; no copy-trade or execution claim.

definitions.title: Compare disclosure lag classes
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded source-lag, half-life, consensus, and decay scenarios.
limitations: Disclosure research only; no copy-trade or execution claim.

definitions.title: Shortlist waterfront markets
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through budget, property, water, travel, insurance, flood, and club evidence.
limitations: Research screen only; drive time is approximate and finalist facts require verification.

definitions.title: Verify a market finalist
definitions.outcomeDescription: Complete a current-source checklist for property fit, flood, insurance, travel, and club evidence.
limitations: Research screen only; drive time is approximate and finalist facts require verification.

definitions.title: Explain the volatility throttle
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through forecast, regime, target, cap, floor, and magnitude-only sizing evidence.
limitations: Magnitude-only research workflow; no direction, order, or execution.

definitions.title: Investigate an estimator conflict
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded EWMA, GARCH, mixed, or unresolved evidence branch.
limitations: Magnitude-only research workflow; no direction, order, or execution.

definitions.title: Evaluate a Palm Springs acquisition scenario
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through source-qualified segment, ADR, occupancy, financing, cost, insurance, regulation, and horizon assumptions.
limitations: Research scenario only; missing property economics remain unavailable and no transaction is created.

definitions.title: Stress luxury and regulation assumptions
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded large-luxury, occupancy, insurance, and regulation scenarios.
limitations: Research scenario only; missing property economics remain unavailable and no transaction is created.

definitions.title: Evaluate a large-luxury Ocean Shores scenario
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through source-qualified segment, ADR, occupancy, financing, cost, storm, regulation, and horizon assumptions.
limitations: Research scenario only; missing property economics remain unavailable and no transaction is created.

definitions.title: Stress season and weather assumptions
definitions.outcomeDescription: Compare bounded occupancy, storm, insurance, regulation, and horizon scenarios.
limitations: Research scenario only; missing property economics remain unavailable and no transaction is created.

definitions.title: Qualify or refuse a technical setup
definitions.outcomeDescription: Walk through context, location, confirmation, validation, and risk gates.
limitations: Research workflow only; unavailable owner evidence cannot become a setup signal or execution.

definitions.title: Investigate a model-family conflict
definitions.outcomeDescription: Reach a bounded supporting, contradicting, unstable, unavailable, or unresolved branch.
limitations: Research workflow only; unavailable owner evidence cannot become a setup signal or execution.

steps.title: Prepare the session evidence
steps.purpose: Review current evidence and record the preparation focus.

accessibility.label: Prepare session evidence
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded preparation focus.

steps.title: Triage current evidence
steps.purpose: Record the terminal action, no-action, or unresolved research branch.

accessibility.label: Triage current evidence
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded terminal research branch.

steps.title: Evaluate latent-risk evidence
steps.purpose: Complete the composed checklist and decision outcome against current evidence.

accessibility.label: Evaluate latent risk
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the composed risk outcome.

steps.title: Compare portfolio stress scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare a baseline and bounded stress scenario using an opaque local reference.

accessibility.label: Compare portfolio stress scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded scenarios without serializing private values.

steps.title: Check breadth evidence
steps.purpose: Confirm the current breadth and concentration evidence required by the goal.

accessibility.label: Check breadth evidence
accessibility.description: Review current breadth evidence and acknowledge the bounded result.

steps.title: Classify the outlier
steps.purpose: Record the terminal outlier research branch supported by current evidence.

accessibility.label: Classify the outlier
accessibility.description: Review current outlier evidence and record a bounded branch.

steps.title: Triage unusual contracts
steps.purpose: Review current anomaly evidence and record the research focus.

accessibility.label: Triage unusual contracts
accessibility.description: Review current anomaly evidence without inferring trade side.

steps.title: Classify catalyst or noise
steps.purpose: Record the terminal catalyst, noise, or unresolved research branch.

accessibility.label: Classify catalyst or noise
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded terminal branch.

steps.title: Classify session evidence
steps.purpose: Review current auction evidence and record the bounded session class.

accessibility.label: Classify the session
accessibility.description: Review current auction evidence and record a bounded session class.

steps.title: Compare level scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded trigger and invalidation scenarios against current evidence.

accessibility.label: Compare level scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare trigger and invalidation scenarios without creating an order.

steps.title: Classify the swing regime
steps.purpose: Record the terminal trend, range, reversal, or unresolved branch.

accessibility.label: Classify the swing regime
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded terminal branch.

steps.title: Compare support scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded support-hold and support-failure scenarios.

accessibility.label: Compare support scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded support scenarios against current evidence.

steps.title: Map option-implied levels
steps.purpose: Review current walls, flip, expected move, and skew evidence.

accessibility.label: Map option-implied levels
accessibility.description: Review current option evidence and record the research focus.

steps.title: Compare option-wall scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded spot, volatility, sign, and time scenarios.

accessibility.label: Compare option-wall scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded scenarios without claiming dealer-position certainty.

steps.title: Classify the gamma-flip setup
steps.purpose: Record the terminal pin, trend, overextension, or unresolved branch.

accessibility.label: Classify the gamma-flip setup
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded terminal branch.

steps.title: Check OPEX evidence
steps.purpose: Confirm expiration-cycle, gamma, OVI, trigger, and invalidation evidence.

accessibility.label: Check OPEX evidence
accessibility.description: Review current expiration-cycle evidence and acknowledge the bounded result.

steps.title: Classify the sector transition
steps.purpose: Record the terminal rotate-in, rotate-out, wait, or unresolved branch.

accessibility.label: Classify the sector transition
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded terminal branch.

steps.title: Select the ETF research vehicle
steps.purpose: Review current fit, liquidity, cost, concentration, and tracking evidence.

accessibility.label: Select an ETF research vehicle
accessibility.description: Review current vehicle evidence and record the research choice.

steps.title: Compare country candidates
steps.purpose: Review current momentum, FX, freshness, risk, and diversification evidence.

accessibility.label: Compare country candidates
accessibility.description: Review current country evidence and record the research choice.

steps.title: Compare FX and risk scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded FX, volatility, freshness, and diversification assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare FX and risk scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded scenarios against current country evidence.

steps.title: Build the driver thesis
steps.purpose: Review current dollar, rate, risk, volatility, drawdown, and breadth evidence.

accessibility.label: Build the driver thesis
accessibility.description: Review current driver evidence and record the research focus.

steps.title: Compare driver reversal scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded driver-support and driver-reversal assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare driver reversal scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded scenarios against current driver evidence.

steps.title: Check fixed-income regime evidence
steps.purpose: Confirm current rates, spreads, curve, real-yield, inflation, and confirmation evidence.

accessibility.label: Check fixed-income regime evidence
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and acknowledge the bounded regime result.

steps.title: Compare sleeve scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded rate, spread, carry, convexity, and inflation assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare sleeve scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded sleeve scenarios against current evidence.

steps.title: Identify beneficiary evidence
steps.purpose: Review current theme, horizon, crowding, risk, and source evidence.

accessibility.label: Identify beneficiary evidence
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the research focus.

steps.title: Compare barbell scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded beneficiary, damper, crowding, correlation, and objective assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare barbell scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded portfolio-research scenarios without execution.

steps.title: Build the earnings tree
steps.purpose: Review current anchors and record the bounded earnings-scenario focus.

accessibility.label: Build the earnings tree
accessibility.description: Review current anchors and record the research focus.

steps.title: Compare valuation-driver scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded margin, EPS, anchor, and multiple assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare valuation-driver scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded scenarios without claiming an earnings forecast.

steps.title: Check evidence sufficiency
steps.purpose: Confirm source, period, lineage, gap, and accepted-state evidence.

accessibility.label: Check evidence sufficiency
accessibility.description: Review current source evidence and acknowledge explicit gaps.

steps.title: Revise the linked scenario
steps.purpose: Review source-qualified assumptions and record the bounded scenario revision.

accessibility.label: Revise the linked scenario
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded linked-scenario revision.

steps.title: Select the ETF objective
steps.purpose: Review current ranking, benchmark, risk, basket, and constraint evidence.

accessibility.label: Select the ETF objective
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the bounded research objective.

steps.title: Compare ranking scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded horizon, momentum, risk, benchmark, weighting, and constraint assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare ranking scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded ranking scenarios without allocating a basket.

steps.title: Evaluate one variable
steps.purpose: Review the seeded search and record the bounded acceptance choice.

accessibility.label: Evaluate one variable
accessibility.description: Review the seeded out-of-sample evidence and record the research choice.

steps.title: Check out-of-sample failure evidence
steps.purpose: Confirm fold, penalty, instability, and rejected-change evidence.

accessibility.label: Check out-of-sample failure evidence
accessibility.description: Review current failure evidence and acknowledge the bounded result.

steps.title: Classify edge survival
steps.purpose: Record the terminal survives, rejected, partial, or unresolved validation branch.

accessibility.label: Classify edge survival
accessibility.description: Review validation evidence and record a bounded terminal branch.

steps.title: Compare strategy variants
steps.purpose: Compare bounded rule, fold, embargo, cost, trial, and robustness assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare strategy variants
accessibility.description: Compare bounded validation scenarios without deployment or execution.

steps.title: Evaluate the disclosure cluster
steps.purpose: Review current source, lag, cluster, consensus, and decay evidence.

accessibility.label: Evaluate the disclosure cluster
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the bounded research focus.

steps.title: Compare disclosure lag scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded source-mix, half-life, consensus, and decay assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare disclosure lag scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded disclosure scenarios without a copy-trade claim.

steps.title: Build the market shortlist
steps.purpose: Review current budget, property, water, travel, insurance, flood, and club evidence.

accessibility.label: Build the market shortlist
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the bounded shortlist focus.

steps.title: Check finalist evidence
steps.purpose: Confirm current property, flood, insurance, travel, and club evidence.

accessibility.label: Check finalist evidence
accessibility.description: Review current finalist evidence and acknowledge explicit gaps.

steps.title: Explain the throttle
steps.purpose: Review current forecast, regime, target, cap, floor, notional, and horizon evidence.

accessibility.label: Explain the volatility throttle
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the magnitude-only research focus.

steps.title: Classify the estimator conflict
steps.purpose: Record the terminal EWMA, GARCH, mixed, or unresolved evidence branch.

accessibility.label: Classify the estimator conflict
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded terminal branch.

steps.title: Evaluate the acquisition assumptions
steps.purpose: Review current source-qualified segment, revenue, financing, cost, insurance, regulation, and horizon evidence.

accessibility.label: Evaluate the acquisition assumptions
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the bounded scenario focus.

steps.title: Compare luxury and regulation scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded large-luxury, occupancy, insurance, and regulation assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare luxury and regulation scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded scenarios without creating a transaction.

steps.title: Evaluate the large-luxury assumptions
steps.purpose: Review current source-qualified segment, revenue, financing, cost, storm, regulation, and horizon evidence.

accessibility.label: Evaluate the large-luxury assumptions
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the bounded scenario focus.

steps.title: Compare season and weather scenarios
steps.purpose: Compare bounded occupancy, storm, insurance, regulation, and horizon assumptions.

accessibility.label: Compare season and weather scenarios
accessibility.description: Compare bounded scenarios without creating a transaction.

steps.title: Evaluate the five gates
steps.purpose: Review current context, location, confirmation, validation, and risk evidence.

accessibility.label: Evaluate the five gates
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record the bounded setup result.

steps.title: Classify the model-family conflict
steps.purpose: Record the terminal supporting, contradicting, unstable, unavailable, or unresolved branch.

accessibility.label: Classify the model-family conflict
accessibility.description: Review current evidence and record a bounded terminal branch.
